# Workflow Contract: [Name]

_Last updated: 2026-06-30_

## 1. Workflow name

- Name:

## 2. User goal

Describe what the Fund Manager or selected profile workflow is trying to achieve.

## 3. Current spreadsheet equivalent

State the workbook sheet(s), sections, or manual process currently used.

## 4. Route and input screens

List:

- route(s)
- screen(s)
- entry points
- profile context required

## 5. Database tables

List the tables or record sets involved, including all profile-owned tables.

## 6. Status transitions

Document the expected workflow states and transitions.

| From status | Action | To status | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|

## 7. Calculations touched

List all calculation contracts or derived values affected by this workflow.

## 8. Reports touched

List any dashboards, summaries, or date-range reports affected by this workflow.

## 9. Edge cases

List likely edge cases, including:

- missing values
- partial settlement
- voids or refunds
- profile mismatch
- manual overrides
- overdue or expired items

## 10. Audit notes

State what events, notes, or change history should be retained.

## 11. Tests required

List required automated tests and fixtures for this workflow.

## 12. Playwright path

If UI-facing, define the intended Playwright user path and expected assertions.
